Package io.papermc.paper.registry.event

@Experimental @NullMarked package io.papermc.paper.registry.event
This package contains events related to the Paper registry system.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.papermc.paper.registry
     
    io.papermc.paper.registry.event.type
    This package contains events related to the Paper registry system.
    io.papermc.paper.registry.data
    Collection of registry entry types that may be created or modified via the RegistryEvent.
    io.papermc.paper.registry.holder
    Registry holders.
    io.papermc.paper.registry.keys
     
    io.papermc.paper.registry.set
    This package contains the API for registry sets in Paper.
    io.papermc.paper.registry.tag
     
  • Class
    Description
    RegistryComposeEvent<T,B extends RegistryBuilder<T>>
    Event object for RegistryEventProvider.compose().
    RegistryEntryAddEvent<T,B extends RegistryBuilder<T>>
    Event object for RegistryEventProvider.entryAdd().
    RegistryEvent<T>
    Base type for all registry events.
    RegistryEventProvider<T,B extends RegistryBuilder<T>>
    Provider for registry events for a specific registry.
    RegistryEvents
    Holds providers for RegistryEntryAddEvent and RegistryComposeEvent handlers for each applicable registry.
    WritableRegistry<T,B extends RegistryBuilder<T>>
    A registry which supports registering new objects.
